node.statement: HOLEVO INFO: χ(Λ) = S(Σ p_i Λ(|ψ_i⟩⟨ψ_i|)) - Σ p_i S(Λ(|ψ_i⟩⟨ψ_i|)). For annealed 2-Rényi with Haar circuits: χ = -log_d E_U Tr(Λ_U(1/d^N)^2) + log_d E_U Tr(Λ_U(|0⟩⟨0|)^2). First term equals Tr(ρ_B^2). Same Hashing bound, same finite-depth scaling. χ/N = min(g_{s,e}+1, g_{s,s}+r) - min(g_{s,e}+1, g_{s,s}). [Eqs.(22-24), main.tex lines 331-345]
